en: EMERGENCY - IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED
Metalaxyl + Mancozeb @ 2.5g/L water (₹800-900/acre) - Apply immediately
Cymoxanil + Mancozeb @ 2.5g/L water (₹900-1000/acre)
Dimethomorph 50 WP @ 1g/L water (₹1000-1200/acre)
Chlorothalonil 75 WP @ 2g/L water (₹600-700/acre) for preventive spraying
Apply every 5-7 days in wet weather
ROTATE FUNGICIDES to prevent resistance
Available at: Bayer, Syngenta, UPL dealers, local agro centers

नम मौसम में हर 5-7 दिन में छिड़काव करें

en: ⚠️ ORGANIC REMEDIES HAVE LIMITED EFFECTIVENESS - USE CHEMICALS FOR ACTIVE INFECTION
Bordeaux mixture (1%): Copper sulfate 1kg + Lime 1kg in 100L water

Remove and destroy infected plants immediately
Neem oil (5ml/L) + Garlic extract (100g/L) as preventive spray
hi: ⚠️ जैविक उपचार सीमित प्रभावशीलता रखते हैं - सक्रिय संक्रमण के लिए रसायनों का उपयोग करें

en: CRITICAL: Use certified disease-free seed tubers only
Plant resistant varieties: Kufri Pukhraj, Kufri Himalini, Kufri Girdhari
Destroy cull piles and volunteer potatoes
Avoid planting near tomato fields
Preventative fungicide program starting 40-45 days after planting
Harvest during dry conditions and store properly
